## GhostRun 2.0.0-alpha.6

Supply-chain cleanup — clears Dependabot false positives from stale workspace files.

### Fixed
- Removed stale `pnpm-lock.yaml` (15+ Dependabot alerts from unused pnpm tree)
- Removed legacy `apps/cli` and `apps/runtime` (fastify alerts)
- Dropped vulnerable `uuid` from `@ghostrun/database` — uses `crypto.randomUUID`
- Pinned `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk` to `^1.29.0`
- Added `.github/dependabot.yml` for root npm only

```bash
npm install -g ghostrun-cli@2.0.0-alpha.6
```
